seoTitle: Fusemi (Senwei) News | Product Innovations, Industry Updates
seoDescription: Latest news from Fusemi including new IGBT modules, SiC devices, and technology innovations in power semiconductors.

news.title: Fusemi Launches 1200V SiC MOSFET Series for EV and Solar
news.summary: New SC series SiC MOSFETs deliver industry-leading efficiency for 800V EV platforms and 1500V solar inverters.
news.content:
Fusemi (Suzhou Senwei Electronics) has announced the launch of its new 1200V SiC MOSFET series designed for high-efficiency power conversion applications. The SC series features ultra-low RDS(on) and fast switching characteristics ideal for 800V EV traction inverters and 1500V solar applications.

Key specifications:
- Voltage rating: 1200V
- Current ratings: 20A to 100A
- RDS(on): as low as 45mΩ
- Junction temperature: up to 175°C
- TO-247 and custom packages available

The new devices enable system efficiencies exceeding 98% in EV inverters, significantly reducing cooling requirements and extending vehicle range.

news.title: Fusemi Achieves IATF 16949 Automotive Certification
news.summary: Fusemi receives IATF 16949 certification, reinforcing commitment to automotive quality for EV power semiconductor solutions.
news.content:
Suzhou Senwei Electronics Co., Ltd. has successfully achieved IATF 16949:2016 automotive quality management system certification. This milestone validates Fusemi's quality systems for the design and manufacture of power semiconductors for electric vehicle applications.

The certification covers:
- IGBT modules for traction inverters
- SiC MOSFETs for high-efficiency converters
- Automotive-grade MOSFETs
- Power integrated modules (PIM)

This achievement positions Fusemi as a qualified supplier to major automotive OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers in the rapidly growing EV market.

news.title: LiTong and Fusemi Expand Distribution Partnership
news.summary: LiTong Electronics strengthens partnership with Fusemi to enhance technical support and inventory for power semiconductors.
news.content:
LiTong Electronics and Fusemi (Suzhou Senwei) have announced an expansion of their distribution partnership to better serve the growing demand for power semiconductors in industrial and automotive applications.

The expanded partnership includes:
- Increased inventory of IGBT modules and SiC devices
- Enhanced FAE technical support for application design
- Joint customer training programs
- Faster sample delivery for development projects
- Local stock for urgent requirements

This partnership supports the rapid growth in EV, renewable energy, and industrial automation markets in the Asia-Pacific region.
